verses.text: Tu-in Elisha in a tapa a hin'kiksak numei kiangah, “Ding in; na innkuan tawh kihemkhia in la, na hih theihna peuhpeuhah peem in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kialpi khat tungsak ding a, gamsungah tua kialpi kum sagih sung hong tung ding hi,” ci khinzo hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua numei dingin Pasian' mipa thugen bangin gamta hi. Tuanu a innkuan tawh pai-in Filistia-te gamah kum sagih sung a peem hi
Kum sagih a cin' khit, Filistia-te gam panin tua numei hong ciahkik ciangin, kumpipa kiangah a inn leh a leitang a ngen dingin a pai hi
Tua laitakin Pasian' mipa' nasem Gehazi tawh kumpipa kiho a, “Elisha' sepsa na lian khempeuh hong gen in,” a ci hi

Elisha in a sisa mi a hin'sakna thu kumpipa kiangah a gen laitakin, a tapa a hin'kiksak numei in kumpipa kiangah a inn leh a leitang hong ngen hi. Tua ciangin Gehazi in, “Ka topa, Kumpipa aw, hih lai-ah a numei om a, Elisha in a hin'kiksak a tapa zong hih lai-ah om hi,” a ci hi

Kumpipa in numei kiangah a dot ciangin tuanu in ama kiangah a gen hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in a uliante khat sawlin, “Leitang a nusiat ni-a kipan tuhun dong lo panin a piang khempeuh tawh ama-a' ahi khempeuh piakik in,” a ci hi.
Syria kumpipa Benhadad cina-in a om laitakin Damaskas-ah Elisha hong pai hi. Ama kiangah, “Hih lai-ah Pasian' mipa hong pai hi,” ci-in a kigen ciangin

kumpipa in ama nuai-a ulian Hazael kiangah, “Letsong khat kengin Pasian' mipa a dawn dingin va pai in. Ama tung tawnin Topa thu va dong in la, ‘Hih natna panin ka damkikzo ding hiam, ci hi,’ va ci in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah a dawn dingin Hazael pai a, Damaskas-a na hoih namkim kalaoh puak sawmli, letsong a keng hi. Amah hong tungin ama mai-ah a din' ciangin amah in, “Syria kumpipa na tapa Benhadad in nang kiangah kei hong sawlin, ‘Hih natna panin ka damkikzo ding hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah, “Pai in; ama kiangah gen in, ‘Na damkik taktak ding hi,’ va ci in. Ahi zongin amah a sih taktakna ding thu Topa in kei kiangah hong lak khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah a maizum dongin a etna mun mah en denin Hazael sal gega hi. Tua ciangin Pasian' mipa a kap hi

Tua ciangin Hazael in, “Bang hangin ka topa kap na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite tungah nangmah in na bawl ding siatna ka thei hi. Nangmah in amau' munmuan'huaite mei tawh na hal ding a, namsau tawh amau' tangvalte thatin, amau' naupang neute lei na den'khapna ding a, naupaii amau' numeite na phelkham ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Hazael in, “Ui bang ahi lel na nasempa in hih na lian a hih dingin bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Elisha in dawngin, “Syria tungah nang kumpi na hih ding thu Topa in kei tungah hong lak khinzo hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Elisha kiang panin amah kihemkhia a, ama kiangah, “Elisha in nang kiangah bang hong ci ahi hiam?” a na ci Benhadad kiangah va tung hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Amah in kei kiangah nang na damkik taktakna ding thu hong gen hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amah in a zing ciangin delhphah puan khat la-in tui sungah tua puan diah a, tua puan kawt tawh kumpipa' maitang tuamcipin a sisak hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin Hazael kumpi a suak hi.
Israel kumpi, Ahab' tapa Joram' kum ngana kumin, Judah kumpi, Jehoshafat' tapa Jehoram in uk ding kipan hi
Amah kumpi a suah hunin ama pian' kum sawmthumlenih pha a, Jerusalem-ah kum giat sung a uk hi
Ahab' tanu ama zi ahih manin Ahab' innkuante' gamtatnasa, Israel kumpite' lampi mah amah in tawn hi. Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi
Ahi zongin amah in ama tung leh a suante tungah ukna a piak ding thu ciam khin ahih manin a nasem David' hangin Topa in Judah gam susia nuamlo hi
Ama hun sungin Judah gam ukna panin Edom mite lengkhia-in amau-a' ding kumpi khat koih uh hi

Tua ciangin Judah kumpi Jehoram zong a leengte khempeuh tawh Zair-ah a kuan hi. Tua lai-ah Edom mite in amaute na umcih uh a, ahi zongin zanin amaute kipanin amah leh a leeng ukte in Edom mite vatgawpin inn-ah a tai uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin Judah gam ukna panin Edom mite lengkhia hi. Tua ciangin tua hun mahin Libnah lengkhia leuleu hi
Jehoram' gamtatna a omlaite leh ama sep khempeuh, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Jehoram si a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Ahaziah in uk hi.
Israel kumpi, Ahab' tapa Joram' kum sawmlenihna kumin, Judah kumpi, Jehoram' tapa Ahaziah in uk ding kipan hi
Amah in uk ding a kipatin Ahaziah kum sawmnihlenih pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum khat sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Athaliah hi a, Israel kumpi Omri' tanu ahi hi
Amah zong Ahab' innkuante' makpa ahih manin Ahab' innkuante' gamtatsa bangin Topa' muhna-ah a sia gamta a, Ahab' innkuante' lampi mah a tawn hi
Syria kumpipa Hazael tawh gal kido dingin Ahab' tapa Joram tawh kipawlin Ahaziah a kuan hi. Syria mite in a galkidona mun Ramothgilead-ah Israel kumpi Joram liamsak uh hi

Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa Hazael a sim laitakin Syria mite in amah a liamsakna mate Jezreel khua-ah a kidamsak dingin kumpi Joram ciahkik hi. Jezreel-ah Ahab' tapa Joram a cina-in om ahih manin a veh dingin Judah kumpi Jehoram' tapa Ahaziah va paisuk hi.
